'''wogavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:coacervated|coacervated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coacervated|coacervated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wogavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wogavithi|wogavithi]] || [[word:wogaviji|wogaviji]] || [[word:wogavishi|wogavishi]] || [[word:wogaviki|wogaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wogavuthuthu|wogavuthuthu]] || [[word:wogavujuju|wogavujuju]] || [[word:wogavushushu|wogavushushu]] || [[word:wogavukuku|wogavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wogavuthu|wogavuthu]] || [[word:wogavuju|wogavuju]] || [[word:wogavushu|wogavushu]] || [[word:wogavuku|wogavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wogavufthuf|wogavufthuf]] || [[word:wogavufjuf|wogavufjuf]] || [[word:wogavufshuf|wogavufshuf]] || [[word:wogavufkuf|wogavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wogavethe|wogavethe]] || [[word:wogaveje|wogaveje]] || [[word:wogaveshe|wogaveshe]] || [[word:wogaveke|wogaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wogavothotho|wogavothotho]] || [[word:wogavojojo|wogavojojo]] || [[word:wogavoshosho|wogavoshosho]] || [[word:wogavokoko|wogavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wogavotho|wogavotho]] || [[word:wogavojo|wogavojo]] || [[word:wogavosho|wogavosho]] || [[word:wogavoko|wogavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wogavofthof|wogavofthof]] || [[word:wogavofjof|wogavofjof]] || [[word:wogavofshof|wogavofshof]] || [[word:wogavofkof|wogavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfthĂŻf|wogavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfjĂŻf|wogavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfshĂŻf|wogavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfkĂŻf|wogavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|wogavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|wogavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|wogavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|wogavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfthĂŻf|wogavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfjĂŻf|wogavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfshĂŻf|wogavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfkĂŻf|wogavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfthĂŻf|wogavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfjĂŻf|wogavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfshĂŻf|wogavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wogavĂŻfkĂŻf|wogavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wogavĂŠthĂŠ|wogavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wogavĂŠjĂŠ|wogavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wogavĂŠshĂŠ|wogavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wogavĂŠkĂŠ|wogavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wogavathatha|wogavathatha]] || [[word:wogavajaja|wogavajaja]] || [[word:wogavashasha|wogavashasha]] || [[word:wogavakaka|wogavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wogavatha|wogavatha]] || [[word:wogavaja|wogavaja]] || [[word:wogavasha|wogavasha]] || [[word:wogavaka|wogavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wogavafthaf|wogavafthaf]] || [[word:wogavafjaf|wogavafjaf]] || [[word:wogavafshaf|wogavafshaf]] || [[word:wogavafkaf|wogavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wogavasha|wogavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wogavshĂ«sha|wogavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wogavrosha|wogavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wogavmusha|wogavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wogavyasha|wogavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowogavnkshĂ«sha|gowogavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowogavnkrosha|gowogavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowogavnkmusha|gowogavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowogavnkyasha|gowogavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wogagavasha|wogagavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wogagavshĂ«sha|wogagavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wogagavrosha|wogagavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wogagavmusha|wogagavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wogagavyasha|wogagavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowogagavnkshĂ«sha|gowogagavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowogagavnkrosha|gowogagavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowogagavnkmusha|gowogagavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowogagavnkyasha|gowogagavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wegĂŠvasha|wegĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wegĂŠvshĂ«sha|wegĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wegĂŠvrosha|wegĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wegĂŠvmusha|wegĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wegĂŠvyasha|wegĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowegĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|gowegĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowegĂŠvnkrosha|gowegĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowegĂŠvnkmusha|gowegĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowegĂŠvnkyasha|gowegĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wogfavasha|wogfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wogfavshĂ«sha|wogfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wogfavrosha|wogfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wogfavmusha|wogfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wogfavyasha|wogfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowogfavnkshĂ«sha|gowogfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowogfavnkrosha|gowogfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowogfavnkmusha|gowogfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowogfavnkyasha|gowogfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
